    Publications

    You can also find my articles on my Google Scholar profile.

    Journal Articles

    IoT-Based Smart Fertigation System for Citrus Plants using Fuzzy Logic Control

    Published in Journal of Information Systems and Informatics, 2025

    Overall, the IoT–FLC integration provides a more adaptive and eco-efficient irrigation model that promotes sustainable management of water and nutrients...

    Recommended citation: I. Ali, A. Adrinoviarini, O. A. Banaty, and M. I. Kamil. (2025). "IoT-Based Smart Fertigation System for Citrus Plants using Fuzzy Logic Control." Journal of Information Systems and Informatics. 7(4).
    Download Paper

    Arduino Microcontroller-Based Automatic Irrigation System for Grape Cultivation

    Published in Journal of Artificial Intelligence and Engineering Applications (JAIEA), 2025

    The purpose of this research is to design an automatic irrigation system based on soil humidity levels for grapevines that...

    Recommended citation: Ali, I., Warisma, S., & Aljabar, A. (2025). "Arduino Microcontroller-Based Automatic Irrigation System for Grape Cultivation." Journal of Artificial Intelligence and Engineering Applications (JAIEA). 5(1).
    Download Paper

    Land-use suitability evaluation for organic rice cultivation using fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE method

    Published in Register: Jurnal Ilmiah Teknologi Sistem Informasi, 2021

    This study's results indicate that integrating the web with fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE is quite effectively applied for decision-making in organic farming....

    Recommended citation: I. Ali, V. Gunawan, and K. Adi. (2021). "Land-use suitability evaluation for organic rice cultivation using fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE method." Register: Jurnal Ilmiah Teknologi Sistem Informasi. 7(1).
    Download Paper

    Conference Papers

    Decision Support Systems for Land Suitability Evaluation on Rice Cultivation using ELECTRE Method

    Published in The 5th International Conference on Energy, Environmental and Information System (ICENIS 2020), 2020

    The result shows that the application of this method is quite effective for decision making so that alternatives are obtained...

    Recommended citation: I. Ali, V. Gunawan, and K. Adi. (2020). "Decision Support Systems for Land Suitability Evaluation on Rice Cultivation using ELECTRE Method." In The 5th International Conference on Energy, Environmental and Information System (ICENIS 2020).
